properties.name: spring.aws.s3.access-key-id
properties.description: AWS access key ID for static credential configuration. Leave blank to use the default AWS credential provider chain (environment variables, instance profile, etc.).

properties.name: spring.aws.s3.default-bucket
properties.description: Default bucket name used by application-level convenience wrappers. Not used internally by the starter — purely for injection into application beans. Defaults to empty string.

properties.name: spring.aws.s3.enabled
properties.description: Whether the S3 starter is enabled. Defaults to {@code true}.

properties.name: spring.aws.s3.endpoint-override
properties.description: Custom endpoint URL for S3-compatible services such as LocalStack or MinIO. Leave blank to use the standard AWS S3 endpoints. Example: {@code http://localhost:4566}

properties.name: spring.aws.s3.path-style-access
properties.description: Whether to use path-style access for S3 requests ({@code http://endpoint/bucket/key}) instead of virtual-hosted-style ({@code http://bucket.endpoint/key}). Must be {@code true} for LocalStack and MinIO compatibility. Defaults to {@code false}.

properties.name: spring.aws.s3.presigned-url-expiry-minutes
properties.description: Expiry duration in minutes for pre-signed GET URLs generated by {@link io.github.saumilp.starters.s3.service.S3StorageService#presignedGetUrl}. Defaults to {@code 60} minutes.

properties.name: spring.aws.s3.region
properties.description: AWS region for the S3 client. Defaults to {@code "us-east-1"}. Override with the region where your bucket resides.

properties.name: spring.aws.s3.secret-access-key
properties.description: AWS secret access key paired with {@link #accessKeyId}. Leave blank to use the default AWS credential provider chain.
